name: David Layardi
heroBio: ~8 years driving infrastructure modernization across E-commerce, GovTech, and Fintech. Now pioneering Agentic AI for infrastructure operations — from Claude Code plugins to autonomous cloud systems.
bio: Infrastructure & AI Engineer with ~8 years of experience. Pioneering Agentic AI for infrastructure operations at Rakuten — building Claude Code plugins that cut document creation by 80% and AI pipelines that reduced incident investigation from 24h to 2h. Proven track record of 90%+ cost reduction while maintaining 99.9% availability.
